Reamostras de validacao cruzada

Source: R/machine-learning.R
rnp_ml_cv.Rd

Cria as particoes de validacao cruzada k-fold (rsample::vfold_cv()).

Usage

rnp_ml_cv(data, v = 10, repeticoes = 1, estrato = NULL, seed = 42L)

Arguments

data

data.frame.

v

Numero de folds.

repeticoes

Numero de repeticoes.

estrato

Nome (string) da variavel de estratificacao. Opcional.

seed

Inteiro.

Value

Um objeto rset de reamostras.

See also

Other ml: rnp_ml_ajustar(), rnp_ml_arvore(), rnp_ml_boosting(), rnp_ml_comparar(), rnp_ml_floresta(), rnp_ml_importancia(), rnp_ml_knn(), rnp_ml_particao(), rnp_ml_prever(), rnp_ml_receita(), rnp_ml_regularizada(), rnp_ml_svm(), rnp_ml_tunagem()

Examples

# \donttest{
rnp_ml_cv(iris, v = 5, estrato = "Species")
#> #  5-fold cross-validation using stratification 
#> # A tibble: 5 × 2
#>   splits           id   
#>   <list>           <chr>
#> 1 <split [120/30]> Fold1
#> 2 <split [120/30]> Fold2
#> 3 <split [120/30]> Fold3
#> 4 <split [120/30]> Fold4
#> 5 <split [120/30]> Fold5
# }
